TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cole_Aldrich, title = Cole_Aldrich, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cole_Aldrich} }

S.FORM: Cole Aldrich hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 10 ru 31 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Minnesota, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Hornets. Cole Aldrich mqaws beh minisutaco,pulumitun pqwasan biru. hiya ga blaq balay qutux unrokay. 2007 kawas Cole Aldrich ga te tzyu qsahuy ru te mtzyul mzyu mari unrokay maki Amerika. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cole Aldrich hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pkaki' kkska'. kawas te 1988, byacing te 10 ru 31 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Minnesota, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 211 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 115 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2010 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Hornets. Cole Aldrich mqaws beh minisutaco,pulumitun pqwasan biru. hiya ga blaq balay qutux unrokay. 2007 kawas Cole Aldrich ga te tzyu qsahuy ru te mtzyul mzyu mari unrokay maki Amerika. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨole al*riʦ~ʨħ ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pkakiʔ kks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa minnes~ɕota, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, *** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu new orleans~ɕ ħornets~ɕ. ʦ~ʨole al*riʦ~ʨħ mqaws~ɕ βeħ minis~ɕutaʦ~ʨo,pulumitun pqwas~ɕan βiru. ħija ɣa βlaq βalaj qutux unrokaj. **** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨole al*riʦ~ʨħ ɣa te tzju qs~ɕaħuj ru te mtzjul mzju mari unrokaj maki amerika. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
